ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company producing the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warranty associated with the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Customer rating of the product */,
  "exchangable" TEXT /* Exchange policy for the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Product specifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_warranty_id FOREIGN KEY ("warranty_id") REFERENCES warranties ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the warranty */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the warranty */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Service provider for the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color option */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code for the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being exchanged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the exchange */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange request */,
  "exchange_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., main, thumbnail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spec */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the spec belongs to */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the spec */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the spec */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
